article_theme: A rigorous technical and economic benchmark analysis (InferenceXv2) evaluating Nvidia and AMD's latest GPUs across advanced AI inference techniques like disaggregated prefill, wide expert parallelism, and low-precision formats.
structure_summary: The article opens by introducing the InferenceXv2 benchmark and acknowledging hardware partners. It then provides a technical primer on fundamental tradeoffs (interactivity vs throughput) and parallelism strategies (TP, EP, DP). The core of the piece is a deep dive into benchmark results, comparing AMD and Nvidia across various setups (single-node, multi-node, FP4/FP8) and models (DeepSeek R1, GPT-OSS). It critically evaluates the software ecosystems (SGLang vs TRT-LLM, AMD's ATOM) and advanced techniques (WideEP, Disaggregated Prefill). The article concludes with updates to the InferenceX repository, the authors' AI-assisted coding journey, and the roadmap for future benchmarking.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.section_role: Establishes metadata, authorship, and the hardcore technical scope of the article.
translation_notes: Keep hardware SKUs and framework names (SGLang, vLLM, TRTLLM) in English.
Ensure standard industry translations for advanced terms: 'Disaggregated Serving' (分离式推理/服务) and 'Wide Expert Parallelism' (宽专家并行).

sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.section_role: Introduces the InferenceXv2 benchmark project, its open-source ethos, and its continuous testing methodology.
translation_notes: Contrast 'static, point-in-time benchmarks' (静态的、基于特定时间点的基准测试) cleanly against 'continuous tests' (持续测试).
Maintain an inviting, community-focused tone for the GitHub and dashboard call-outs.

sections.title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight

sections.section_role: Delivers the executive summary of the benchmark's most critical and controversial findings regarding the AMD vs. Nvidia rivalry.
translation_notes: The slang 'framemog' is highly informal and aggressive; translate with an equivalent internet-native tech term like '降维打击' (dimensional strike) or '全面碾压' (completely crush).
Translate 'composability' strictly as '可组合性' in the context of software optimizations.

Translate 'Pushing Pareto Frontier' accurately as '推动帕累托前沿' or '拓展帕累托最优边界'.

sections.title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts

sections.section_role: Acts as a structural signpost, warning non-technical readers while inviting them to learn the fundamentals.

Keep the tone welcoming but authoritative.

sections.title: Interactivity vs Throughput Tradeoff

sections.next_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Defines the fundamental economic and performance tradeoffs governing LLM inference.
translation_notes: Ensure precise translation of metrics: 'tok/s/user' (每用户每秒生成Token数) and 'TPOT' (首字后生成时间/每个输出Token耗时).
Translate 'Disaggregated prefill' as '分离式Prefill' or 'Prefill-Decode分离阶段'.

sections.title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the distributed computing strategies used to scale LLM inference across multiple GPUs.
translation_notes: Retain acronyms (TP, EP, DP) but pair them with clear Chinese equivalents (张量并行, 专家并行, 数据并行).
Use standard NCCL/MPI terminology for communication primitives: 'all-reduce' (全归约) and 'all-to-all collective' (全对安全局通信).

sections.title: Tracking Improvements Over Time
sections.previous_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the temporal methodology of InferenceX, emphasizing that software evolves much faster than hardware.
translation_notes: The terms 'O(yearly)' and 'O(weekly)' use Big O notation metaphorically. Translate as '以年为数量级/周期' and '以周为数量级/周期'.

sections.title: DeepSeek R1
sections.section_role: Provides a concrete case study showing recent, massive software-driven performance gains on a specific model using AMD hardware.
translation_notes: 'Upstream' used as a verb is crucial open-source terminology. Translate 'upstream performance enhancing changes' as '将性能优化代码向上游提交/合并' (merging back to the main branch).
